Python Module Index

a | c | d | i | l | n | o | p | s
 
a
archive A base module defining the behaviour of archive specific classes.
    archive.dmf
 
c
core Core classes and utilities.
    core.configfile ConfigFile class and configuration file management based on Python's ConfigParser
    core.configure Configure class to handle configuration parameters and environement variables
    core.factory Factory utility with a couple of goodies.
    core.index General index tree
    core.innerpython InnerPython to handle Python introspection and internals to try and keep clean.
    core.json Copnvertion to and from the json format
    core.texttemplate TextTemplate to generate text at runtime.
    core.tools Different tools, some are clever some are just shortcuts.
    core.truthparser A parser and computation engine for boolean expressions
 
d
directive The Directive is a python dictionary which is checked and setup by using the language module.
    directive.directive
directives
 
i
impacttimeseries Computing scores from different experiments in the archive
 
l
language Utilities to define and check the semantics of a dictionary, set default values, convert to final types.
    language.language
    language.languagedefinition
 
n
netcdf A netcdf file reader which implements a basic slicing infrastructure.
 
o
observations
ods Utilities for reading and filtering ODS files.
 
p
plotting Plotting of observation statistics framework
 
s
semperpy
    semperpy.core.date Date class and Date management functions.
    semperpy.core.dategroup Grouping dates according to different criteria
services Utilities to implement client-server applications
    services.html
    services.response
    services.responses
    services.server
    services.service
slicer
    slicer.arraygenerator
    slicer.cf10
    slicer.dimensions
    slicer.slice2array
    slicer.slice2list
    slicer.slicer
slicing Slicing of multi-dimensional arrays along an arbitrary numbers of dimensions.
    slicing.cf10 Implementing dimension classes which work on CF 1.0 files.
    slicing.dimensions Implementing the actual slicing along one single dimension
stats Statistics
